id=\"mac定时开机sudo-pmset-repeat-wakeorpoweron-mtwrf-083000\">mac定时开机<code>sudo pmset repeat wakeorpoweron MTWRF 08:30:00</code></h3>\n<details>\n<summary>pmset</summary>\n<p><code>pmset</code> 是 macOS 中用于管理电源管理设置的命令行工具。它可以用来调度系统的唤醒、睡眠和关机等事件。使用 <code>pmset schedule</code> 命令，你可以设置特定的时间让你的 Mac 进行唤醒或关机。</p>\n<p>以下是 <code>pmset schedule</code> 命令的基本用法：</p>\n<ol>\n<li>\n<p><strong>唤醒</strong>: 你可以设置 Mac 在特定时间唤醒。例如，使用以下命令可以在 2023 年 5 月 1 日的早上 8:00 唤醒 Mac：</p>\n<pre class=\"astro-code material-theme-palenight\" style=\"background-color:#292D3E;color:#babed8; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word;\" tabindex=\"0\" data-language=\"bash\"><code><span class=\"line\"><span style=\"color:#FFCB6B\">sudo</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> pmset</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> schedule</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> wake</span><span style=\"color:#89DDFF\"> \"</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\">05/01/23 08:00:00</span><span style=\"color:#89DDFF\">\"</span></span>\n<span class=\"line\"></span></code></pre>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p><strong>关机</strong>: 如果你想在特定时间关机，可以使用：</p>\n<pre class=\"astro-code material-theme-palenight\" style=\"background-color:#292D3E;color:#babed8; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word;\" tabindex=\"0\" data-language=\"bash\"><code><span class=\"line\"><span style=\"color:#FFCB6B\">sudo</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> pmset</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> schedule</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> shutdown</span><span style=\"color:#89DDFF\"> \"</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\">05/01/23 20:00:00</span><span style=\"color:#89DDFF\">\"</span></span>\n<span class=\"line\"></span></code></pre>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p><strong>取消调度</strong>: 如果你想取消之前设置的调度，可以使用：</p>\n<pre class=\"astro-code material-theme-palenight\" style=\"background-color:#292D3E;color:#babed8; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word;\" tabindex=\"0\" data-language=\"bash\"><code><span class=\"line\"><span style=\"color:#FFCB6B\">sudo</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> pmset</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> schedule</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> cancel</span></span>\n<span class=\"line\"></span></code></pre>\n</li>\n<li>\n<p><strong>重复调度</strong>: 你也可以设置重复的调度，例如每天在某个时间唤醒：</p>\n<pre class=\"astro-code material-theme-palenight\" style=\"background-color:#292D3E;color:#babed8; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word;\" tabindex=\"0\" data-language=\"bash\"><code><span class=\"line\"><span style=\"color:#FFCB6B\">sudo</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> pmset</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> repeat</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> wakeorpoweron</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> MTWRF</span><span style=\"color:#C3E88D\"> 08:00:00</span></span>\n<span class=\"line\"></span></code></pre>\n</li>\n</ol>\n<p>请注意，<code>pmset</code> 命令需要以管理员权限运行，因此在命令前加上 <code>sudo</code> 是必要的。此外，确保你的系统时间设置正确，以便调度能够按预期执行。</p>\n<p>有关 <code>pmset</code> 的更多详细信息，可以参考其手册页，使用命令 <code>man pmset</code> 查看所有可用选项和设置。</p>\n</details></shoelace>";

					return "\n# 第一步\n\n去[这里](https://qwerty.kaiyi.cool/)进行英语的肌肉记忆练习\n\n## [cheatsheet](https://vim.rtorr.com/lang/zh_cn)\n\n## [another cheatsheet](https://devhints.io/vim)\n\n## 配置 neovide neovim\n\n```shell\nbrew install neovim\nbrew install neovide --cask\nmkdir -p ~/.config/nvim\nnvim ~/.config/nvim/init.vim\n```\n\n[neovide 配置](https://neovide.dev/configuration.html)\n\n## nushell\n\n```bash\nbrew install nushell\n```\n\n## homebrew\n\n```bash\n/bin/bash -c \"$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sH)\"\n```\n\n<details>\n<summary>install.sh</summary>\n\n```bash\n#!/bin/bash\n\n# We don't need return codes for \"$(command)\", only stdout is needed.\n# Allow `[[ -n \"$(command)\" ]]`, `func \"$(command)\"`, pipes, etc.\n# shellcheck disable=SC2312\n\nset -u\n\nabort() {\n  printf \"%s\\n\" \"$@\" >&2\n  exit 1\n}\n\n# Fail fast with a concise message when not using bash\n# Single brackets are needed here for POSIX compatibility\n# shellcheck disable=SC2292\nif [ -z \"${BASH_VERSION:-}\" ]\nthen\n  abort \"Bash is required to interpret this script.\"\nfi\n\n# Check if script is run with force-interactive mode in CI\nif [[ -n \"${CI-}\" && -n \"${INTERACTIVE-}\" ]]\nthen\n  abort \"Cannot run force-interactive mode in CI.\"\nfi\n\n# Check if both `INTERACTIVE` and `NONINTERACTIVE` are set\n# Always use single-quoted strings with `exp` expressions\n# shellcheck disable=SC2016\nif [[ -n \"${INTERACTIVE-}\" && -n \"${NONINTERACTIVE-}\" ]]\nthen\n  abort 'Both `$INTERACTIVE` and `$NONINTERACTIVE` are set. Please unset at least one variable and try again.'\nfi\n\n# Check if script is run in POSIX mode\nif [[ -n \"${POSIXLY_CORRECT+1}\" ]]\nthen\n  abort 'Bash must not run in POSIX mode. Please unset POSIXLY_CORRECT and try again.'\nfi\n\nusage() {\n  cat <<EOS\nHomebrew Installer\nUsage: [NONINTERACTIVE=1] [CI=1] install.sh [options]\n    -h, --help       Display this message.\n    NONINTERACTIVE   Install without prompting for user input\n    CI               Install in CI mode (e.g. do not prompt for user input)\nEOS\n  exit \"${1:-0}\"\n}\n\nwhile [[ $# -gt 0 ]]\ndo\n  case \"$1\" in\n    -h | --help) usage ;;\n    *)\n      warn \"Unrecognized option: '$1'\"\n      usage 1\n      ;;\n  esac\ndone\n\n# string formatters\nif [[ -t 1 ]]\nthen\n  tty_escape() { printf \"\\033[%sm\" \"$1\"; }\nelse\n  tty_escape() { :; }\nfi\ntty_mkbold() { tty_escape \"1;$1\"; }\ntty_underline=\"$(tty_escape \"4;39\")\"\ntty_blue=\"$(tty_mkbold 34)\"\ntty_red=\"$(tty_mkbold 31)\"\ntty_bold=\"$(tty_mkbold 39)\"\ntty_reset=\"$(tty_escape 0)\"\n\nshell_join() {\n  local arg\n  printf \"%s\" \"$1\"\n  shift\n  for arg in \"$@\"\n  do\n    printf \" \"\n    printf \"%s\" \"${arg// /\\ }\"\n  done\n}\n\nchomp() {\n  printf \"%s\" \"${1/\"$'\\n'\"/}\"\n}\n\nohai() {\n  printf \"${tty_blue}==>${tty_bold} %s${tty_reset}\\n\" \"$(shell_join \"$@\")\"\n}\n\nwarn() {\n  printf \"${tty_red}Warning${tty_reset}: %s\\n\" \"$(chomp \"$1\")\" >&2\n}\n\n# Check if script is run non-interactively (e.g. CI)\n# If it is run non-interactively we should not prompt for passwords.\n# Always use single-quoted strings with `exp` expressions\n# shellcheck disable=SC2016\nif [[ -z \"${NONINTERACTIVE-}\" ]]\nthen\n  if [[ -n \"${CI-}\" ]]\n  then\n    warn 'Running in non-interactive mode because `$CI` is set.'\n    NONINTERACTIVE=1\n  elif [[ ! -t 0 ]]\n  then\n    if [[ -z \"${INTERACTIVE-}\" ]]\n    then\n      warn 'Running in non-interactive mode because `stdin` is not a TTY.'\n      NONINTERACTIVE=1\n    else\n      warn 'Running in interactive mode despite `stdin` not being a TTY because `$INTERACTIVE` is set.'\n    fi\n  fi\nelse\n  ohai 'Running in non-interactive mode because `$NONINTERACTIVE` is set.'\nfi\n\n# USER isn't always set so provide a fall back for the installer and subprocesses.\nif [[ -z \"${USER-}\" ]]\nthen\n  USER=\"$(chomp \"$(id -un)\")\"\n  export USER\nfi\n\n# First check OS.\nOS=\"$(uname)\"\nif [[ \"${OS}\" == \"Linux\" ]]\nthen\n  HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX=1\nelif [[ \"${OS}\" == \"Darwin\" ]]\nthen\n  HOMEBREW_ON_MACOS=1\nelse\n  abort \"Homebrew is only supported on macOS and Linux.\"\nfi\n\n# Required installation paths. -x \"/usr/bin/sudo\" ]]\n  then\n    return 1\n  fi\n\n  local -a SUDO=(\"/usr/bin/sudo\")\n  if [[ -n \"${SUDO_ASKPASS-}\" ]]\n  then\n    SUDO+=(\"-A\")\n  elif [[ -n \"${NONINTERACTIVE-}\" ]]\n  then\n    SUDO+=(\"-n\")\n  fi\n\n  if [[ -z \"${HAVE_SUDO_ACCESS-}\" ]]\n  then\n    if [[ -n \"${NONINTERACTIVE-}\" ]]\n    then\n      \"${SUDO[@]}\" -l mkdir &>/dev/null\n    else\n      \"${SUDO[@]}\" -v && \"${SUDO[@]}\" -l mkdir &>/dev/null\n    fi\n    HAVE_SUDO_ACCESS=\"$?\"\n  fi\n\n  if [[ -n \"${HOMEBREW_ON_MACOS-}\" ]] && [[ \"${HAVE_SUDO_ACCESS}\" -ne 0 ]]\n  then\n    abort \"Need sudo access on macOS (e.g. the user ${USER} needs to be an Administrator)!\"\n  fi\n\n  return \"${HAVE_SUDO_ACCESS}\"\n}\n\nexecute() {\n  if ! \"$@\"\n  then\n    abort \"$(printf \"Failed during: %s\" \"$(shell_join \"$@\")\")\"\n  fi\n}\n\nexecute_sudo() {\n  local -a args=(\"$@\")\n  if have_sudo_access\n  then\n    if [[ -n \"${SUDO_ASKPASS-}\" ]]\n    then\n      args=(\"-A\" \"${args[@]}\")\n    fi\n    ohai \"/usr/bin/sudo\" \"${args[@]}\"\n    execute \"/usr/bin/sudo\" \"${args[@]}\"\n  else\n    ohai \"${args[@]}\"\n    execute \"${args[@]}\"\n  fi\n}\n\ngetc() {\n  local save_state\n  save_state=\"$(/bin/stty -g)\"\n  /bin/stty raw -echo\n  IFS='' read -r -n 1 -d '' \"$@\"\n  /bin/stty \"${save_state}\"\n}\n\nring_bell() {\n  # Use the shell's audible bell.\n  if [[ -t 1 ]]\n  then\n    printf \"\\a\"\n  fi\n}\n\nwait_for_user() {\n  local c\n  echo\n  echo \"Press ${tty_bold}RETURN${tty_reset}/${tty_bold}ENTER${tty_reset} to continue or any other key to abort:\"\n  getc c\n  # we test for \\r and \\n because some stuff does \\r instead\n  if ! [[ \"${c}\" == $'\\r' || \"${c}\" == $'\\n' ]]\n  then\n    exit 1\n  fi\n}\n\nmajor_minor() {\n  echo \"${1%%.*}.$(\n    x=\"${1#*.}\"\n    echo \"${x%%.*}\"\n  )\"\n}\n\nversion_gt() {\n  [[ \"${1%.*}\" -gt \"${2%.*}\" ]] || [[ \"${1%.*}\" -eq \"${2%.*}\" && \"${1#*.}\" -gt \"${2#*.}\" ]]\n}\nversion_ge() {\n  [[ \"${1%.*}\" -gt \"${2%.*}\" ]] || [[ \"${1%.*}\" -eq \"${2%.*}\" && \"${1#*.}\" -ge \"${2#*.}\" ]]\n}\nversion_lt() {\n  [[ \"${1%.*}\" -lt \"${2%.*}\" ]] || [[ \"${1%.*}\" -eq \"${2%.*}\" && \"${1#*.}\" -lt \"${2#*.}\" ]]\n}\n\ncheck_run_command_as_root() {\n  [[ \"${EUID:-${UID}}\" == \"0\" ]] || return\n\n  # Allow Azure Pipelines/GitHub Actions/Docker/Concourse/Kubernetes to do everything as root (as it's normal there)\n  [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && return\n  [[ -f /run/.containerenv ]] && return\n  [[ -f /proc/1/cgroup ]] && grep -E \"azpl_job|actions_job|docker|garden|kubepods\" -q /proc/1/cgroup && return\n\n  abort \"Don't run this as root!\"\n}\n\nshould_install_command_line_tools() {\n  if [[ -n \"${HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX-}\" ]]\n  then\n    return 1\n  fi\n\n  if version_gt \"${macos_version}\" \"10.13\"\n  then\n    ! -x \"$1\" ]]\n  then\n    return 1\n  fi\n\n  local git_version_output\n  git_version_output=\"$(\"$1\" --version 2>/dev/null)\"\n  if [[ \"${git_version_output}\" =~ \"git version \"([^ ]*).* ]]\n  then\n    version_ge \"$(major_minor \"${BASH_REMATCH[1]}\")\" \"$(major_minor \"${REQUIRED_GIT_VERSION}\")\"\n  else\n    abort \"Unexpected Git version: '${git_version_output}'!\"\n  fi\n}\n\n# Search for the given executable in PATH (avoids a dependency on the `which` command)\nwhich() {\n  # Alias to Bash built-in command `type -P`\n  type -P \"$@\"\n}\n\n# Search PATH for the specified program that satisfies Homebrew requirements\n# function which is set above\n# shellcheck disable=SC2230\nfind_tool() {\n  if [[ $# -ne 1 ]]\n  then\n    return 1\n  fi\n\n  local executable\n  while read -r executable\n  do\n    if [[ \"${executable}\" != /* ]]\n    then\n      warn \"Ignoring ${executable} (relative paths don't work)\"\n    elif \"test_$1\" \"${executable}\"\n    then\n      echo \"${executable}\"\n      break\n    fi\n  done < <(which -a \"$1\")\n}\n\nno_usable_ruby() {\n  [[ -z \"$(find_tool ruby)\" ]]\n}\n\noutdated_glibc() {\n  local glibc_version\n  glibc_version=\"$(ldd --version | head -n1 | grep -o '[0-9.]*$' | grep -o '^[0-9]\\+\\.[0-9]\\+')\"\n  version_lt \"${glibc_version}\" \"${REQUIRED_GLIBC_VERSION}\"\n}\n\nif [[ -n \"${HOMEBREW_ON_LINUX-}\" ]] && no_usable_ruby && outdated_glibc\nthen\n  abort \"$(\n    cat <<EOABORT\nHomebrew requires Ruby ${REQUIRED_RUBY_VERSION} which was not found on your system.\nHomebrew portable Ruby requires Glibc version ${REQUIRED_GLIBC_VERSION} or newer,\nand your Glibc version is too old. git\n\n```bash\nbrew install git\n```\n\nor\n\n```bash\nxcode-select --install\n```\n\n## rust\n\n```bash\ncurl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh\n```\n\n## pnpm\n\n```bash\nnpm install -g pnpm\n```\n\n> 这些最近又重装了一次 mac 进行的工作\n\n- mac 查看系统变量`printenv`\n\n```lua\nlua << EOF\n\n-------------\n-- Nvim-qt --\n-------------\n\nif vim.g.GuiLoaded then\n  local font_name = \"JetBrainsMono Nerd Font\"\n  local font_size = 11\n  local not_transparent = false\n\n  local function toggle_transparency()\n    not_transparent = not not_transparent\n    if not_transparent then\n      vim.cmd(\"GuiWindowOpacity \" .. (0.9))\n    else\n      vim.cmd(\"GuiWindowOpacity \" .. (1.0))\n    end\n  end\n\n  vim.keymap.set(\"n\", \"<F10>\", toggle_transparency, { silent = true })\n\n  local function toggle_fullscreen()\n    if vim.g.GuiWindowFullScreen == 0 then\n      vim.cmd(\"call GuiWindowFullScreen(\" .. 1 .. \")\")\n    else\n      vim.cmd(\"call GuiWindowFullScreen(\" .. 0 .. \")\")\n    end\n  end\n\n  vim.keymap.set(\"n\", \"<F11>\", toggle_fullscreen, { silent = true })\n\n  vim.cmd [[\n  GuiTabline 0\n  GuiPopupmenu 0\n  ]]\n  vim.cmd(\"GuiFont! \" .. font_name .. \":h\" .. font_size)\nend\n\n-------------\n-- Neovide --\n-------------\n\nif vim.g.neovide then\n  vim.opt.guifont = \"JetBrainsMono Nerd Font:h11\"\n  vim.g.remember_window_size = true\n  vim.g.remember_window_position = true\n\n  local function toggle_transparency()\n    if vim.g.neovide_transparency == 1.0 then\n      vim.cmd \"let g:neovide_transparency=0.8\"\n    else\n      vim.cmd \"let g:neovide_transparency=1.0\"\n    end\n  end\n\n  local function toggle_fullscreen()\n    if vim.g.neovide_fullscreen == false then\n      vim.cmd \"let g:neovide_fullscreen=v:true\"\n    else\n      vim.cmd \"let g:neovide_fullscreen=v:false\"\n    end\n  end\n\n  vim.keymap.set(\"n\", \"<F11>\", toggle_fullscreen, { silent = true })\n  vim.keymap.set(\"n\", \"<F10>\", toggle_transparency, { silent = true })\nend\n\nEOF\n```\n\n### 禁用 DS_Store 自动生成\n\n```shell\ndefaults write com.apple.desktopservices DSDontWriteNetworkStores -bool TRUE\n```\n\n删除所有 ds_store\n\n```shell\nfind . -name ‘*.DS_Store’ -type f -delete\n```\n\n### vim 技巧\n\n```shell\n#ctrl + u\n向上滚动半屏\n#ctrl + d\n向下滚动半屏\n```\n\n### @rollup/plugin-node-resolve 作用\n\n```js\n// 不配置 @rollup/plugin-node-resolve 插件引入方式\nexport foo from \"./foo/index.js\";\nimport bar from \"./bar/index.js\";\n```\n\n```js\n// 配置了 @rollup/plugin-node-resolve 插件引入方式\nexport foo from \"./foo\";\nimport bar from \"./bar\";\n```\n\n## Shoelace\n\nimport Shoelace from '@components/react/shoelace/index.astro'\n\n<Shoelace />\n\n```mdx\nimport Shoelace from '@components/react/shoelace/index.astro'\n<Shoelace client:load/\n\n>\n```\n\n### npm 镜像\n\n```\nnpm config set registry=https://registry.npmjs.org\n```\n\n### mac 绕过公证\n\n> mac提示应用已损坏\n\n```shell\nsudo xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine /Applications/xxxxxx.app\n```\n\n### mac定时开机`sudo pmset repeat wakeorpoweron MTWRF 08:30:00`\n\n<details>\n<summary>pmset</summary>\n\n`pmset` 是 macOS 中用于管理电源管理设置的命令行工具。它可以用来调度系统的唤醒、睡眠和关机等事件。使用 `pmset schedule` 命令，你可以设置特定的时间让你的 Mac 进行唤醒或关机。\n\n以下是 `pmset schedule` 命令的基本用法：\n\n1. **唤醒**: 你可以设置 Mac 在特定时间唤醒。例如，使用以下命令可以在 2023 年 5 月 1 日的早上 8:00 唤醒 Mac：\n\n   ```bash\n   sudo pmset schedule wake \"05/01/23 08:00:00\"\n   ```\n\n2. **关机**: 如果你想在特定时间关机，可以使用：\n\n   ```bash\n   sudo pmset schedule shutdown \"05/01/23 20:00:00\"\n   ```\n\n3. **取消调度**: 如果你想取消之前设置的调度，可以使用：\n\n   ```bash\n   sudo pmset schedule cancel\n   ```\n\n4. **重复调度**: 你也可以设置重复的调度，例如每天在某个时间唤醒：\n   ```bash\n   sudo pmset repeat wakeorpoweron MTWRF 08:00:00\n   ```\n\n请注意，`pmset` 命令需要以管理员权限运行，因此在命令前加上 `sudo` 是必要的。此外，确保你的系统时间设置正确，以便调度能够按预期执行。\n\n有关 `pmset` 的更多详细信息，可以参考其手册页，使用命令 `man pmset` 查看所有可用选项和设置。\n\n</details>\n";
				}
